## Initial Results {.nav-proposed}
We learn the preferences of these oracles using a simple ideal-point PBL model under a 2x2 study.

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1em;">
<div style="flex: 10;">
<div style="margin-top: -1.5em;">
![](images/cumulative_regret.svg){width="90%"}
</div>

<div style="margin-top: -2em;">
![](images/l2_distance.svg){width="90%"}
</div>
</div>
<div style="flex: 9;">
We apply Wilcoxon signed-rank test to our results:

1. $L_2$ distance was significantly lower with an exploration stage $(p < 0.0001,~W=38)$.
2. Cummulative regret was significantly higher with an exploration stage $(p < 0.00001,~W=36)$.
</div>
</div>
